productDisplayName: Puma Men's Rajasthan Royals White T-shirt
description: &amp;nbsp; Composition White round neck, dry Fit t-shirt made of a cotton and polyester mix fabric Fitting Comfort Wash care 1.Normal action (40 degree)  2. Normal tumble dry 3. Wash dark colours separately 4. Use cool iron 5. Reverse iron on print The 2008 IPL champs are out with a vengeance to win the tournament again this season. With just a few days left for the IPL to end, it’s time you flaunt your loyalty with all vigor in this white t-shirt from myntra’s IPL collection. Made of a cotton and polyester mix, this T-shirt wicks away sweat and keeps you dry and comfortable while you go all out to cheer your team to victory even in the scorching heat. Team this with jeans and absolutely stylish cricket shoes from the wide collection available at myntra and drown in the IPL enthusiasm.
